title: Plutarch, Moralia: Reply to Colotes
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Reply to Colotes.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Reply to Colotes.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Reply to Colotes': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
